title: blocked-by
summary:
Link relation type "blocked-by": Identifies the entity that blocks access to a resource
      following receipt of a legal demand. Defined in RFC7725.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Mon, 12 Jan 2026 18:11:26 GMT
